text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship is here at last! I'm so
focused I can't even look at the other
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Except for King, who's radiant as a phoenix. As
expected, she's stolen my attention—nay, my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: When I think about how I'll be able to look into the depths of King... Drool... ☆ All right! Okay! Let's treat it like any other race!
